<div class="sr-sec">八、未来走势预估</div><div class="sr-card"><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px"><div style="background:#fff8e1;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid #ffb300"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#e65100;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">短期（1-5天）</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#202124;margin-bottom:8px">短期承压</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;line-height:1.7">短期技术面偏弱，关注量价配合情况。MA5(510.2)为近期重要支撑。</div></div><div style="background:#e8f5e9;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid #43a047"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#2e7d32;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">中期（1个月）</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#202124;margin-bottom:8px">震荡整理</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;line-height:1.7">若回调至MA5(510.2)-MA10(505.5)区间则是较好的中期买入机会，目标价参考569.5元。</div></div><div style="background:#fce8e6;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid #ef5350"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#c62828;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">长期（3-6个月）</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#202124;margin-bottom:8px">关注基本面兑现</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;line-height:1.7">若业绩持续增长，估值有望得到支撑；若业绩不达预期，存在一定回调风险。结合行业趋势和竞争格局综合判断。</div></div></div></div>

<div class="sr-sec">九、综合投资建议</div>
<div class="sr-rec-watch">
<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px">
<div class="sr-ring-wrap sr-ring-warn" style="flex-shrink:0"><div>
<div style="font-size:26px;font-weight:900;line-height:1">5.0</div><div style="font-size:10px">/ 10</div>
</div></div>
<div>
<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#f57c00">注意控仓，压力较大</div>
<div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;margin-top:4px">综合评分基于：技术面 + 资金面 + 基本面 + 机构评级</div>
</div></div>
<div style="font-size:13px;color:#202124;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:14px">
<p>核心结论：注意控仓，压力较大。建议等待回调至HK$480.3区间建仓，止损HK$441.9，目标HK$569.5。</p>
</div>
<div class="sr-pt-grid"><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">当前价</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#f57c00">HK$495.2</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">当前位置</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">回调买入区间</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#1565c0">HK$480.3</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">BOLL下轨/MA5支撑区</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">强支撑区/止损</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#ea4335">HK$441.9</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">MA20下方缓冲</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">中期目标</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#34a853">HK$569.5</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">近52周高位</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">长期目标</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#34a853">HK$643.8</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">趋势延续前提</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">止损价</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#ea4335">HK$441.9</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">跌破则离场</span></div></div>
